basic_details.job_title: Allahabad University Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Research Assistant and Field Investigator Posts
basic_details.short_information: University of Allahabad Research Assistant and Field Investigator Notification 2026 has been released on the official website aupravesh2025.cbtexam.in. A total of 3 vacancies have been announced through the Allahabad University Research Assistant and Field Investigator Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Postgraduate in Social Science with 55% marks for Research Assistant; Graduate in Social Science with 55% marks for Field Investigator.
qualification.details: Research Assistant: Postgraduate in any Social Science Discipline with a Minimum of 55% marks. NET/MPhil./Ph.D. preferred. Experience in Ethnographic Fieldwork preferred. Field Investigator: Graduate in any Social Science discipline with minimum 55% marks. Four-year graduation program preferred. Experience in Ethnographic Fieldwork preferred.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 37,000/- per month, Rs. 20,000/- per month
salary_details.details: Research Assistant: Rs. 37,000/- per month Field Investigator: Rs. 20,000/- per month

selection_process: Shortlisted candidates will be intimated through email about the date of interview.
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Allahabad University Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 10-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Research Assistant and Field Investigator posts at Allahabad University?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 10th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the specified email address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the Research Assistant position?
faq.answer: For the Research Assistant role, candidates must have a Postgraduate degree in any Social Science discipline with a minimum of 55% marks. NET/MPhil./Ph.D. is preferred.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary for a Field Investigator at Allahabad University?
faq.answer: The selected Field Investigator will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 20,000/-. This is a project-based position.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for Research Assistant and Field Investigator?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies. One position is for Research Assistant, and two positions are for Field Investigator.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: As per the information available, there is no application fee mentioned for this recruitment drive by Allahabad University.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for these positions?
faq.answer: The application mode for these positions is via email. Candidates need to send their CV and relevant documents to the provided email address.

faq.question: Q7. What is the preferred qualification for the Field Investigator role?
faq.answer: While a Graduate degree in any Social Science discipline with 55% marks is required, a four-year graduation program is preferred for the Field Investigator position.

faq.question: Q8. Does Allahabad University offer any age relaxation for these posts?
faq.answer: The official notification does not specify age limits or age relaxation details. Candidates are advised to refer to the detailed notification for this information.

faq.question: Q9. What is the nature of employment for these posts?
faq.answer: These are project-based positions. The recruitment is for an ICSSR funded project on the Great Andamanese.

faq.question: Q10. What documents are required to be sent with the application?
faq.answer: Candidates need to send their updated CV along with attested copies of degrees and certificates. It is also advisable to include any relevant experience certificates.
